scope: Cycle 15: Bug hunt C14 boost_weight (merlin_card_system.gd) + feat GFC walk phase orchestration
overall_assessment: Cycle 15: Bug hunt on C14 boost_weight found 0 bugs — _get_card_factions iterates options→effects correctly, _get_faction_boost uses proper threshold check with safe defaults, weighted selection in both get_fastroute_card and _generate_event_card uses standard cumulative roll pattern. Feature: GFC WALK phase added. GameFlowController.wire_walk() connects BroceliandeForest3D.walk_ended signal. Forest collects run_data (reason, biome, life, currency, encounters, season) and emits to GFC. Standalone fallback preserved for scenes without GFC. 25 total bugs fixed across 15 cycles.
